channel.title: Symantec - A Division of Broadcom — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Symantec - A Division of Broadcom (symantec).

item.title: CVE-2026-3991 · 7.8 HIGH — Elevation of Privileges in Symantec Data Loss Prevention Windows Endpoint
item.description: Symantec Data Loss Prevention Windows Endpoint, prior to 25.1 MP1, 16.1 MP2, 16.0 RU2 HF9, 16.0 RU1 MP1 HF12, and 16.0 MP2 HF15, may be susceptible to a Elevation of Privilege vulnerability, which is a type of issue whereby an attacker may attempt to…

item.title: CVE-2026-3862 · 4.6 MEDIUM — Cross-Site Scripting Vulnerability in SiteMinder Administrative UI
item.description: Cross-site Scripting (XSS) allows an attacker to submit specially crafted data to the application which is returned unaltered in the resulting web page.

item.title: CVE-2025-13919 · 4.4 MEDIUM — Component Object Model (COM) Hijacking in Symantec Endpoint Protection Windows Client
item.description: Symantec Endpoint Protection, prior to 14.3 RU10 Patch 1, RU9 Patch 2, and RU8 Patch 3, may be susceptible to a COM Hijacking vulnerability, which is a type of issue whereby an attacker attempts to establish persistence and evade detection by hijacki…

item.title: CVE-2025-13918 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Elevation of Privileges in Symantec Endpoint Protection Windows Client
item.description: Symantec Endpoint Protection, prior to 14.3 RU10 Patch 1, RU9 Patch 2, and RU8 Patch 3, may be susceptible to a Elevation of Privilege vulnerability, which is a type of issue whereby an attacker may attempt to compromise the software application to g…

item.title: CVE-2025-13917 · 7 HIGH — Elevation of Privileges in Web Security Services (WSS) Agent
item.description: WSS Agent, prior to 9.8.5, may be susceptible to a Elevation of Privilege vulnerability, which is a type of issue whereby an attacker may attempt to compromise the software application to gain elevated access to resources that are normally protected…

item.title: CVE-2025-10847 · 8.4 HIGH 🌩️ — DX UIM Probe Improper ACL Handling RCE
item.description: DX Unified Infrastructure Management (Nimsoft/UIM) and below contains an improper ACL handling vulnerability in the robot (controller) component. A remote attacker can execute commands, read from, or write to the target system.

item.title: CVE-2025-9059 · 8.8 HIGH — Elevation of Privileges Vulnerability in IT Management Suite
item.description: The Altiris Core Agent Updater package (AeXNSC.exe) is prone to an elevation of privileges vulnerability through DLL hijacking.

item.title: CVE-2025-8661 · 4.6 MEDIUM — Stored Cross-Site Scripting in Symantec PGP Encryption 11.0.1
item.description: A stored Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability (XSS) occurs when the server does not properly validate or encode the data entered by the user.

item.title: CVE-2025-8660 · 5.6 MEDIUM — Privilege Escalation in Symantec PGP Encryption 11.0.1
item.description: Privilege escalation occurs when a user gets access to more resources or functionality than they are normally allowed.

item.title: CVE-2025-24508 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Offline Extraction of Account Connectivity Credentials (ACCs) in IT Management Suite
item.description: Extraction of Account Connectivity Credentials (ACCs) from the IT Management Agent secure storage

item.title: CVE-2025-5333 · 9.5 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Unauthenticated Remote Code Execution in IT Management Suite
item.description: Remote attackers can execute arbitrary code in the context of the vulnerable service process.

item.title: CVE-2025-3599 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Symantec Endpoint Protection Elevation of Privilege
item.description: Symantec Endpoint Protection Windows Agent, running an ERASER Engine prior to 119.1.7.8, may be susceptible to an Elevation of Privilege vulnerability, which may allow an attacker to delete resources that are normally protected from an application or…

item.title: CVE-2024-11035 · 2.5 LOW — Carbon Black Cloud Windows Sensor Information Leak
item.description: Carbon Black Cloud Windows Sensor, prior to 4.0.3, may be susceptible to an Information Leak vulnerability, which s a type of issue whereby sensitive information may b exposed due to a vulnerability in software.

item.title: CVE-2025-0893 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: Symantec Diagnostic Tool (SymDiag), prior to 3.0.79, may be susceptible to a Privilege Escalation vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2025-24507 · 8.9 HIGH
item.description: This vulnerability allows appliance compromise at boot time.

item.title: CVE-2025-24506 · 5.3 MEDIUM
item.description: A specific authentication strategy allows to learn ids of PAM users associated with certain authentication types.

item.title: CVE-2025-24505 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: This vulnerability allows a high-privileged authenticated PAM user to achieve remote command execution on the affected PAM system by uploading a specially crafted upgrade file.

item.title: CVE-2025-24504 · 5.3 MEDIUM
item.description: An improper input validation the CSRF filter results in unsanitized user input written to the application logs.

item.title: CVE-2025-24503 · 9.3 CRITICAL
item.description: A malicious actor can fix the session of a PAM user by tricking the user to click on a specially crafted link to the PAM server.

item.title: CVE-2025-24502 · 5.3 MEDIUM
item.description: An improper session validation allows an unauthenticated attacker to cause certain request notifications to be executed in the context of an incorrect user by spoofing the client IP address.

item.title: CVE-2025-24501 · 5.3 MEDIUM
item.description: An improper input validation allows an unauthenticated attacker to alter PAM logs by sending a specially crafted HTTP request.

item.title: CVE-2025-24500 · 8.7 HIGH
item.description: The vulnerability allows an unauthenticated attacker to access information in PAM database.

item.title: CVE-2024-38499 · 8.8 HIGH — Improper Privilege Management Vulnerability in CA Client Automation 14.5
item.description: CA Client Automation (ITCM) allows non-admin/non-root users to encrypt a string using CAF CLI and SD_ACMD CLI. This would allow the non admin user to access the critical encryption keys which further causes the exploitation of stored credentials. Thi…

item.title: CVE-2024-38496 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Symantec Privileged Access Manager Insecure Direct Object Reference vulnerability
item.description: The vulnerability allows a malicious low-privileged PAM user to access information about other PAM users and their group memberships.

item.title: CVE-2024-38495 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Symantec Privileged Access Manager User Enumeration vulnerability
item.description: A specific authentication strategy allows a malicious attacker to learn ids of all PAM users defined in its database.

item.title: CVE-2024-38494 · 8.6 HIGH — Symantec Privileged Access Manager Remote Command Execution vulnerability
item.description: This vulnerability allows a high-privileged authenticated PAM user to achieve remote command execution on the affected PAM system by sending a specially crafted HTTP request.

item.title: CVE-2024-38493 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Symantec Privileged Access Manager Reflected Cross Site Scripting vulnerability
item.description: A reflected cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability exists in the PAM UI web interface. A remote attacker able to convince a PAM user to click on a specially crafted link to the PAM UI web interface could potentially execute arbitrary client-side co…

item.title: CVE-2024-38492 · 9.4 CRITICAL — Symantec Privileged Access Manager Remote Command Execution vulnerability
item.description: This vulnerability allows an unauthenticated attacker to achieve remote command execution on the affected PAM system by uploading a specially crafted PAM upgrade file.

item.title: CVE-2024-38491 · 8.4 HIGH — Symantec Privileged Access Manager SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: The vulnerability allows an unauthenticated attacker to read arbitrary information from the database.

item.title: CVE-2024-36458 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Symantec Privileged Access Manager Privilege Escalation vulnerability
item.description: The vulnerability allows a malicious low-privileged PAM user to perform server upgrade related actions.

item.title: CVE-2024-36457 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Symantec Privileged Access Manager Authentication Bypass vulnerability
item.description: The vulnerability allows an attacker to bypass the authentication requirements for a specific PAM endpoint.

item.title: CVE-2024-36456 · 9.4 CRITICAL — Symantec Privileged Access Manager Remote Command Execution vulnerability
item.description: This vulnerability allows an unauthenticated attacker to achieve remote command execution on the affected PAM system by uploading a specially crafted PAM upgrade file.

item.title: CVE-2024-36455 · 9.4 CRITICAL — Symantec Privileged Access Manager Remote Command Execution vulnerability
item.description: An improper input validation allows an unauthenticated attacker to achieve remote command execution on the affected PAM system by sending a specially crafted HTTP request.

item.title: CVE-2024-36459 · 8.4 HIGH 🌩️ — Cross-Site Scripting Vulnerability in Symantec SiteMinder Web Agent
item.description: A CRLF cross-site scripting vulnerability has been identified in certain configurations of the SiteMinder Web Agent for IIS Web Server and SiteMinder Web Agent for Domino Web Server. As a result, an attacker can execute arbitrary Javascript code in a…

item.title: CVE-2023-23958 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Symantec Protection Engine Hash Leak Vulnerability
item.description: Symantec Protection Engine, prior to 9.1.0, may be susceptible to a Hash Leak vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2023-23957 — Open Redirection Vulnerability in Symantec Identity Portal 14.4
item.description: An authenticated user can see and modify the value for ‘next’ query parameter in Symantec Identity Portal 14.4

item.title: CVE-2023-23955 · 8.1 HIGH
item.description: Advanced Secure Gateway and Content Analysis, prior to 7.3.13.1 / 3.1.6.0, may be susceptible to a Server-Side Request Forgery vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2023-23954 · 5.4 MEDIUM
item.description: Advanced Secure Gateway and Content Analysis, prior to 7.3.13.1 / 3.1.6.0, may be susceptible to a Stored Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2023-23953 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: Advanced Secure Gateway and Content Analysis, prior to 7.3.13.1 / 3.1.6.0, may be susceptible to an Elevation of Privilege vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2023-23952 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Advanced Secure Gateway and Content Analysis, prior to 7.3.13.1 / 3.1.6.0, may be susceptible to a Command Injection vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2023-23956 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: A user can supply malicious HTML and JavaScript code that will be executed in the client browser

item.title: CVE-2023-23951 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Ability to enumerate the Oracle LDAP attributes for the current user by modifying the query used by the application

item.title: CVE-2023-23950 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: User’s supplied input (usually a CRLF sequence) can be used to split a returning response into two responses.

item.title: CVE-2023-23949 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: An authenticated user can supply malicious HTML and JavaScript code that will be executed in the client browser.

item.title: CVE-2022-25631 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: Symantec Endpoint Protection, prior to 14.3 RU6 (14.3.9210.6000), may be susceptible to a Elevation of Privilege vulnerability, which is a type of issue whereby an attacker may attempt to compromise the software application to gain elevated

item.title: CVE-2022-25628 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: An authenticated user can perform XML eXternal Entity injection in Management Console in Symantec Identity Manager 14.4

item.title: CVE-2022-25627 · 6.7 MEDIUM
item.description: An authenticated administrator who has physical access to the environment can carry out Remote Command Execution on Management Console in Symantec Identity Manager 14.4

item.title: CVE-2022-25626 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: An unauthenticated user can access Identity Manager’s management console specific page URLs. However, the system doesn’t allow the user to carry out server side tasks without a valid web session.

item.title: CVE-2022-25630 · 5.4 MEDIUM
item.description: An authenticated user can embed malicious content with XSS into the admin group policy page.

item.title: CVE-2022-25629 · 5.4 MEDIUM
item.description: An authenticated user who has the privilege to add/edit annotations on the Content tab, can craft a malicious annotation that can be executed on the annotations page (Annotation Text Column).
